fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.subject.identifier" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.subject.identifier" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Logical reference, when literal reference is not known" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "An identifier for the target resource. This is used when there is no way to reference the other resource directly, either because the entity it represents is not available through a FHIR server, or because there is no way for the author of the resource to convert a known identifier to an actual location. There is no requirement that a Reference.identifier point to something that is actually exposed as a FHIR instance, but it SHALL point to a business concept that would be expected to be exposed as a FHIR instance, and that instance would need to be of a FHIR resource type allowed by the reference." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "When an identifier is provided in place of a reference, any system processing the reference will only be able to resolve the identifier to a reference if it understands the business context in which the identifier is used. Sometimes this is global (e.g. a national identifier) but often it is not. For this reason, none of the useful mechanisms described for working with references (e.g. chaining, includes) are possible, nor should servers be expected to be able resolve the reference. Servers may accept an identifier based reference untouched, resolve it, and/or reject it - see CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.referencePolicy. \n\nWhen both an identifier and a literal reference are provided, the literal reference is preferred. Applications processing the resource are allowed - but not required - to check that the identifier matches the literal reference\n\nApplications converting a logical reference to a literal reference may choose to leave the logical reference present, or remove it.\n\nReference is intended to point to a structure that can potentially be expressed as a FHIR resource, though there is no need for it to exist as an actual FHIR resource instance - except in as much as an application wishes to actual find the target of the reference. The content referred to be the identifier must meet the logical constraints implied by any limitations on what resource types are permitted for the reference.  For example, it would not be legitimate to send the identifier for a drug prescription if the type were Reference(Observation|DiagnosticReport).  One of the use-cases for Reference.identifier is the situation where no FHIR representation exists (where the type is Reference (Any)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Reference.identifier" ] ;

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This is generally not the same as the Resource.text of the referenced resource.  The purpose is to identify what's being referenced, not to fully describe it." ] ;

fhir:value [ fhir:v "ProcedureAsNeededReason" ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "example" ] ;

fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/medication-as-needed-reason"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/medication-as-needed-reason>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "quick" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Proposal.prnReason.reason" ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This is a  role, not  a participation type.  In other words, does not describe the task but describes the capacity.  For example, “compounding pharmacy”, “psychiatrist” or “internal referral”." ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "$this.resolve()" ]         ] ) ;

fhir:rules [ fhir:v "open" ]       ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Requested performer" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The desired performer for doing the requested service.  For example, the surgeon, dermatopathologist, endoscopist, etc." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "If multiple performers are present, it is interpreted as a list of *alternative* performers without any preference regardless of order.  If order of preference is needed use the [request-performerOrder extension](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-request-performerorder.html).  Use CareTeam to represent a group of performers (for example, Practitioner A *and* Practitioner B)." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The desired performer for doing the requested service.  For example, the surgeon, dermatopathologist, endoscopist, etc." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "If multiple performers are present, it is interpreted as a list of *alternative* performers without any preference regardless of order.  If order of preference is needed use the [request-performerOrder extension](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-request-performerorder.html).       ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [ fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
fhir:value [ fhir:v "ServiceRequestLocation" ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "example" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "A location type where services are delivered." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "w5" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "FiveWs.actor" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".participation[typeCode=LOC].role[scoper.determinerCode=KIND].code" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.locationReference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.locationReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Requested location" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A reference to the the preferred location(s) where the procedure should actually happen. E.g. at home or nursing day care center." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.locationReference" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v ".participation[typeCode=LOC].role[scoper.determinerCode=INSTANCE]" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonCode" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonCode" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Codes of the assigned diagoses. Note that in ARIA, multiple alternative codes may be assigned to each single diagnosis." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "An explanation or justification for why this service is being requested in coded or textual form.   This is often for billing purposes.  May relate to the resources referred to in `supportingInfo`." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element represents why the referral is being made and may be used to decide how the service will be performed, or even if it will be performed at all.   Use `CodeableConcept.text` element if the data is free (uncoded) text as shown in the [CT Scan example](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/servicerequest-example-di.html)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonCode" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [ fhir:v "CodeableConcept"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;

fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:binding [
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "extensible" ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-cancer-disorder-vs"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-cancer-disorder-vs>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.reasonCode" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "w5" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "FiveWs.why[x]" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "ORC.16, RF1-10" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".reasonCode" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "References to the Condition resources that represent the assigned diagnoses. May reference multiple Condition resources for the same diagnosis if alternative code systems are used." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates another resource that provides a justification for why this service is being requested.   May relate to the resources referred to in `supportingInfo`." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element represents why the referral is being made and may be used to decide how the service will be performed, or even if it will be performed at all.    To be as specific as possible,  a reference to  *Observation* or *Condition* should be used if available.  Otherwise when referencing  *DiagnosticReport*  it should contain a finding  in `DiagnosticReport.conclusion` and/or `DiagnosticReport.conclusionCode`.   When using a reference to *DocumentReference*, the target document should contain clear findings language providing the relevant reason for this service request.  Use  the CodeableConcept text element in `ServiceRequest.reasonCode` if the data is free (uncoded) text as shown in the [CT Scan example](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/servicerequest-example-di.html)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Reference"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;

fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Condition"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Condition>         ] )       ] ) ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone." ] ;
      ( fhir:alias [ fhir:v "extensions" ] [ fhir:v "user content" ] ) ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "n/a" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.reference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.reference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Literal reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A reference to a location at which the other resource is found. The reference may be a relative reference, in which case it is relative to the service base URL, or an absolute URL that resolves to the location where the resource is found. The reference may be version specific or not. If the reference is not to a FHIR RESTful server, then it should be assumed to be version specific. Internal fragment references (start with '#') refer to contained resources." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Using absolute URLs provides a stable scalable approach suitable for a cloud/web context, while using relative/logical references provides a flexible approach suitable for use when trading across closed eco-system boundaries.   Absolute URLs do not need to point to a FHIR RESTful server, though this is the preferred approach. If the URL conforms to the structure \"/[type]/[id]\" then it should be assumed that the reference is to a FHIR RESTful server." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Reference.reference" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:condition [ fhir:v "ref-1" ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.type" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.type" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Type the reference refers to (e.g. \"Patient\")" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The expected type of the target of the reference. If both Reference.type and Reference.reference are populated and Reference.reference is a FHIR URL, both SHALL be consistent.\n\nThe type is the Canonical URL of Resource Definition that is the type this reference refers to. References are URLs that are relative to http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ e.g. \"Patient\" is a reference to http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient. Absolute URLs are only allowed for logical models (and can only be used in references in logical models, not resources)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element is used to indicate the type of  the target of the reference. This may be used which ever of the other elements are populated (or not). In some cases, the type of the target may be determined by inspection of the reference (e.g. a RESTful URL) or by resolving the target of the reference; if both the type and a reference is provided, the reference SHALL resolve to a resource of the same type as that specified." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Reference.type" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "uri"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [ fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
fhir:value [ fhir:v "FHIRResourceTypeExt" ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "extensible" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Aa resource (or, for logical models, the URI of the logical model)." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/resource-types"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/resource-types>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.identifier" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.identifier" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Logical reference, when literal reference is not known" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "An identifier for the target resource. This is used when there is no way to reference the other resource directly, either because the entity it represents is not available through a FHIR server, or because there is no way for the author of the resource to convert a known identifier to an actual location. There is no requirement that a Reference.identifier point to something that is actually exposed as a FHIR instance, but it SHALL point to a business concept that would be expected to be exposed as a FHIR instance, and that instance would need to be of a FHIR resource type allowed by the reference." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "When an identifier is provided in place of a reference, any system processing the reference will only be able to resolve the identifier to a reference if it understands the business context in which the identifier is used. Sometimes this is global (e.g. a national identifier) but often it is not. For this reason, none of the useful mechanisms described for working with references (e.g. chaining, includes) are possible, nor should servers be expected to be able resolve the reference. Servers may accept an identifier based reference untouched, resolve it, and/or reject it - see CapabilityStatement.rest.resource.referencePolicy. \n\nWhen both an identifier and a literal reference are provided, the literal reference is preferred. Applications processing the resource are allowed - but not required - to check that the identifier matches the literal reference\n\nApplications converting a logical reference to a literal reference may choose to leave the logical reference present, or remove it.\n\nReference is intended to point to a structure that can potentially be expressed as a FHIR resource, though there is no need for it to exist as an actual FHIR resource instance - except in as much as an application wishes to actual find the target of the reference. The content referred to be the identifier must meet the logical constraints implied by any limitations on what resource types are permitted for the reference.  For example, it would not be legitimate to send the identifier for a drug prescription if the type were Reference(Observation|DiagnosticReport).  One of the use-cases for Reference.identifier is the situation where no FHIR representation exists (where the type is Reference (Any)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Reference.identifier" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Identifier"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".identifier" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.display" ] ;
      ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [ fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-translatable"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
fhir:value [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]       ] ) ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Text alternative for the resource" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Plain text narrative that identifies the resource in addition to the resource reference." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This is generally not the same as the Resource.text of the referenced resource.  The purpose is to identify what's being referenced, not to fully describe it." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "Reference.display" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.insurance" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.insurance" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Associated insurance coverage" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Insurance plans, coverage extensions, pre-authorizations and/or pre-determinations that may be needed for delivering the requested service." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.insurance" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Reference"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:targetProfile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Coverage"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Coverage>         ] [

fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ClaimResponse>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "IN1/IN2" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".outboundRelationship[typeCode=COVBY].target" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.supportingInfo" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.supportingInfo" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Additional clinical information" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Additional clinical information about the patient or specimen that may influence the services or their interpretations.     This information includes diagnosis, clinical findings and other observations.  In laboratory ordering these are typically referred to as \"ask at order entry questions (AOEs)\".  This includes observations explicitly requested by the producer (filler) to provide context or supporting information needed to complete the order. For example,  reporting the amount of inspired oxygen for blood gas measurements." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "To represent information about how the services are to be delivered use the `instructions` element." ] ;
      ( fhir:alias [ fhir:v "Ask at order entry question" ] [ fhir:v "AOE" ] ) ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.supportingInfo" ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".outboundRelationship[typeCode=PERT].target" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.specimen" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.specimen" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Procedure Samples" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "One or more specimens that the laboratory procedure will use." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Many diagnostic procedures need a specimen, but the request itself is not actually about the specimen. This element is for when the diagnostic is requested on already existing specimens and the request points to the specimen it applies to.    Conversely, if the request is entered first with an unknown specimen, then the [Specimen](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/specimen.html) resource points to the ServiceRequest." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ] ;

fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Specimen>         ] )       ] ) ;

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "SPM" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".participation[typeCode=SPC].role" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.bodySite" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.bodySite" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Body site to which radiotherapy is prescribed." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Anatomic location where the procedure should be performed. This is the target site." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The body site of an ARIA Prescription is bound to a user editable list\r\nand in FHIR exposed as CodeSystem http://varian.com/fhir/CodeSystem/radiotherapy-prescription-site.\r\nAdditionally, the code is mapped to SNOMED CT codes of the mCODE Radiotnerapy Treatment Location ValueSet where possible." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Knowing where the procedure is performed is important for tracking if multiple sites are possible." ] ;
      ( fhir:alias [ fhir:v "location" ] ) ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A reference to a code defined by a terminology system." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Codes may be defined very casually in enumerations, or code lists, up to very formal definitions such as SNOMED CT - see the HL7 v3 Core Principles for more information.  Ordering of codings is undefined and SHALL NOT be used to infer meaning. Generally, at most only one of the coding values will be labeled as UserSelected = true." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows for alternative encodings within a code system, and translations to other code systems." ] ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v "union(., ./translation)" ]       ] [

fhir:map [ fhir:v "fhir:CodeableConcept.coding rdfs:subPropertyOf dt:CD.coding" ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.bodySite.text" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Plain text representation of the concept" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A human language representation of the concept as seen/selected/uttered by the user who entered the data and/or which represents the intended meaning of the user." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Very often the text is the same as a displayName of one of the codings." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "The codes from the terminologies do not always capture the correct meaning with all the nuances of the human using them, or sometimes there is no appropriate code at all. In these cases, the text is used to capture the full meaning of the source." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "n/a" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note.extension" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note.extension" ] ;
fhir:slicing [
        ( fhir:discriminator [
fhir:type [ fhir:v "value" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "url" ]         ] ) ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url" ] ;
fhir:rules [ fhir:v "open" ]       ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Additional content defined by implementations" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone." ] ;
      ( fhir:alias [ fhir:v "extensions" ] [ fhir:v "user content" ] ) ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Element.extension" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ext-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Must have either extensions or value[x], not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "extension.exists() != value.exists()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), \"value\")])" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "n/a" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note.author[x]" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note.author[x]" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Individual responsible for the annotation" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The individual responsible for making the annotation." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Organization is used when there's no need for specific attribution as to who made the comment." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Annotation.author[x]" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Reference"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:targetProfile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner>         ] [

fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient>         ] [

fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/RelatedPerson>         ] [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization>         ] )       ] [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Act.participant[typeCode=AUT].role" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note.time" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note.time" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "When the annotation was made" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates when this particular annotation was made." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Annotation.time" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "dateTime"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Act.effectiveTime" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note.text" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note.text" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "The annotation  - text content (as markdown)" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The text of the annotation in markdown format." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "Annotation.text" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "markdown"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Act.text" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.patientInstruction" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.patientInstruction" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Patient or consumer-oriented instructions" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Instructions in terms that are understood by the patient or consumer." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.patientInstruction" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;

      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "NTE" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".text" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.relevantHistory" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.relevantHistory" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Request provenance" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Key events in the history of the request." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This might not include provenances for all versions of the request – only those deemed “relevant” or important.\rThis SHALL NOT include the Provenance associated with this current version of the resource.  (If that provenance is deemed to be a “relevant” change, it will need to be added as part of a later update.  Until then, it can be queried directly as the Provenance that points to this version using _revinclude\rAll Provenances should have some historical version of this Request as their subject." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.relevantHistory" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Reference"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:targetProfile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Provenance"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Provenance>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.relevantHistory" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "N/A" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".inboundRelationship(typeCode=SUBJ].source[classCode=CACT, moodCode=EVN]" ]       ] )     ] )
  ] ; # 
  fhir:differential [
    ( fhir:element [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest" ] ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "aria-phase-prescription-status" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Only the following status values are supported for Radiotherapy Prescribed Phases from ARIA: draft | active | revoked | completed | entered-in-error" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "status = 'draft' or status = 'active' or status = 'revoked' or status = 'completed' or status = 'entered-in-error'" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/RadiotherapyPhasePrescription"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/RadiotherapyPhasePrescription>         ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.id" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.id" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Resource id assigned by ARIA. This id is used to reference this resource from other resources.\r\n  Do not use this id or parts of it for other purposes. See element 'identifier' instead." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.meta.versionId" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.meta.versionId" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Revision number that is updated with each modification." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.meta.lastUpdated" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.meta.lastUpdated" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Date and time of the last modification." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.meta.profile" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.meta.profile" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Profiles that this resource complies to." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:respiratoryMotionManagement" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "respiratoryMotionManagement" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Gating method selected in ARIA prescription." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:modalityAndTechnique" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "modalityAndTechnique" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Modalities and techniques defined in the prescription." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:modalityAndTechnique.extension:modality" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "modality" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Treatment modality mapped to mCODE compliant modality code where possible." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:modalityAndTechnique.extension:technique" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "technique" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Treatment technique mapped to mCODE compliant modality code where possible" ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:modalityAndTechnique.extension:radiotherapyEnergyOrIsotope" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "radiotherapyEnergyOrIsotope" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Currently not available from ARIA." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:modalityAndTechnique.extension:radiotherapyTreatmentApplicatorType" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "radiotherapyTreatmentApplicatorType" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Currently not available from ARIA." ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:radiotherapyFractionsPrescribed" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "radiotherapyFractionsPrescribed" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Number of prescribed fractions." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:radiotherapyDosePrescribedToVolume" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "radiotherapyDosePrescribedToVolume" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Dose prescribed to each volume in the prescription." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:radiotherapyDosePrescribedToVolume.extension:volume" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "volume" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Volume to which dose is prescribed in ARIA." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:radiotherapyDosePrescribedToVolume.extension:volume.value[x]" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension.value[x]" ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Reference"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:targetProfile [
fhir:v "http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/RadiotherapyVolume"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/RadiotherapyVolume>         ] )       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:radiotherapyDosePrescribedToVolume.extension:volume.value[x].reference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension.value[x].reference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "For prescription, ARIA does not create BodyStructures." ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "0" ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:radiotherapyDosePrescribedToVolume.extension:volume.value[x].identifier" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension.value[x].identifier" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "For prescription, ARIA exposes the identifier (display name) of the target volume defined in the prescription." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:radiotherapyDosePrescribedToVolume.extension:volume.value[x].display" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension.value[x].display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Display name for the target volume in the ARIA prescription." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:radiotherapyDosePrescribedToVolume.extension:fractionDose" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "fractionDose" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Dose per fraction in [cGy] prescribed to this volume." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:radiotherapyDosePrescribedToVolume.extension:totalDose" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "totalDose" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Total dose in [cGy] prescribed to this volume." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:mcode-procedure-intent" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "mcode-procedure-intent" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Therapeutic intent. Mapped from the intent assigned to the course in ARIA. A value from ARIA's configurable ValueSet http://varian.com/fhir/CodeSystem/radiotherapy-therapeutic-intent is exposed and - if possible - mapped to an additional mCODE compliant code." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/StructureDefinition/mcode-procedure-intent"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/StructureDefinition/mcode-procedure-intent>         ] )       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension:radiotherapy-bolus" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.extension" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "radiotherapy-bolus" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Extension"^^xsd:anyURI ] ;
        ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "http://fhir.siemens-healthineers.com/fhir/R4/StructureDefinition/shs-radiotherapy-bolus-extension"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://fhir.siemens-healthineers.com/fhir/R4/StructureDefinition/shs-radiotherapy-bolus-extension>         ] )       ] ) ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "See slice descriptions." ] ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "phase-id-only-primary-or-boost" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "warning" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Only Phase Ids 'Primary' or 'Boost' are supported. This is a current ARIA limitation. The Phase Id is modelled as Identifier to support more general identifiers in the future." ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "(system = 'http://varian.com/fhir/identifier/radiotherapyPhaseId') implies (value = 'Primary' or value = 'Boost')" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/RadiotherapyPhasePrescription"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:link <http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/RadiotherapyPhasePrescription>         ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier:displayName" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "displayName" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Display name is the Prescription ID in ARIA and unique for the patient." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier:displayName.system" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier.system" ] ;
fhir:pattern [ fhir:v "http://varian.com/fhir/identifier/radiotherapyPrescriptionId"^^xsd:anyURI ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier:official" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "official" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "ARIA identifier that is unique for this instance of ARIA and serves as primary database key." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier:official.system" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier.system" ] ;
fhir:pattern [ fhir:v "http://varian.com/fhir/identifier/RadiotherapyPhase/RadOnc-Id"^^xsd:anyURI ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier:phaseId" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "phaseId" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Identifier that annotates which treatement phase is covered by this prescription. ARIA supports 'Primary' or 'Boost'." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier:phaseId.use" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier.use" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:pattern [ fhir:v "secondary" ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier:phaseId.system" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.identifier.system" ] ;
fhir:pattern [ fhir:v "http://varian.com/fhir/identifier/radiotherapyPhaseId"^^xsd:anyURI ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.basedOn" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.basedOn" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Prescriptions from ARIA reference a ServiceRequest that complies to RadiotherapyCoursePrescription." ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.basedOn.reference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.basedOn.reference" ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.basedOn.display" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.basedOn.display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Name of the Course in case of ARIA prescriptions." ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.basedOn:course-prescription" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.basedOn" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "course-prescription" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "ARIA references the Radiotherapy Course Prescription (parent of all prescriptions belonging to the same Course)." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.status" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.status" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "draft | active | revoked | entered-in-error" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "* Status Mapping:\n  * (ARIA) reviewed  → (FHIR) draft\n  * (ARIA) draft  → (FHIR) draft\n  * (ARIA) approved  → (FHIR) active\n  * (ARIA) errored  → (FHIR) entered-in-error\n  * (ARIA) retired  → (FHIR) revoked." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.intent" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.intent" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Fixed code 'original-order' as defined by CodeX RT." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.category" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.category" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Fixed code for radiotherapy defined by CodeX RT." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.code" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.code" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Fixed code for radiotherapy treatment phase defined by CodeX RT." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.subject" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.subject" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Patient who receives or received the radiotherapy treatment described in this resource." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.subject.reference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.subject.reference" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.subject.display" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.subject.display" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Name of the patient 'Last Name, First Name'." ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.occurrence[x]" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.occurrence[x]" ] ;
fhir:slicing [
        ( fhir:discriminator [
fhir:type [ fhir:v "type" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "$this" ]         ] ) ;
fhir:ordered [ fhir:v "false"^^xsd:boolean ] ;
fhir:rules [ fhir:v "open" ]       ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.occurrence[x]:occurrencePeriod" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.occurrence[x]" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "occurrencePeriod" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Currently not available from ARIA." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Period"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.occurrence[x]:occurrenceTiming" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.occurrence[x]" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "occurrenceTiming" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Prescribed treatment frequency. Supported values are exposed as ValueSet http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/radiotherapy-prescription-frequency." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "Timing"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.authoredOn" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.authoredOn" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Approval Date and Time" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The date and time of approval." ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.requester" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.requester" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Approval User" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "User who approved the prescription." ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonCode" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonCode" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Codes of the assigned diagoses. Note that in ARIA, multiple alternative codes may be assigned to each single diagnosis." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "References to the Condition resources that represent the assigned diagnoses. May reference multiple Condition resources for the same diagnosis if alternative code systems are used." ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.reference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.reference" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.display" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.reasonReference.display" ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.bodySite" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.bodySite" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Body site to which radiotherapy is prescribed." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The body site of an ARIA Prescription is bound to a user editable list\r\nand in FHIR exposed as CodeSystem http://varian.com/fhir/CodeSystem/radiotherapy-prescription-site.\r\nAdditionally, the code is mapped to SNOMED CT codes of the mCODE Radiotnerapy Treatment Location ValueSet where possible." ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Note" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Free text note." ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note.text" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "ServiceRequest.note.text" ] ;
fhir:mustSupport [ fhir:v "true"^^xsd:boolean ]     ] )
  ] . #
